name: @oakoss/tokens
description: DTCG source tokens compiled by Terrazzo into Tailwind v4 @theme output. Workspace-only; outputs distributed via the shadcn-compatible registry.

scripts.build: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('dist',{recursive:true});require('fs').writeFileSync('dist/theme.css','/* placeholder: Terrazzo @theme output lands in #23 */')"
